mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_answer (id, session_id, user_id, question_id, selected_option_keys, is_correct, answered_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{questionId}, #{selectedOptionKeys}, #{isCorrect}, #{answeredAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, user_id, question_id, selected_option_keys, is_correct, answered_at, create_time, update_time FROM user_answer WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY answered_at ASC, id ASC
